en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: WITH STRINGED INSTRUMENTS; ACCORDING TO THE SHEMINITH. A PSALM OF DAVID. O LORD, rebuke me not in your anger, nor discipline me in your wrath.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你不要在烈怒中責備我， 也不要在氣忿中管教我。

en: Be gracious to me, O LORD, for I am languishing; heal me, O LORD, for my bones are troubled.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你恩待我，因為我軟弱； 耶和華啊！求你醫治我，因為我的骨頭發抖。

en: My soul also is greatly troubled. But you, O LORD- how long?
zh: 我的心也大大戰慄， 耶和華啊！要等到幾時呢？

en: Turn, O LORD, deliver my life; save me for the sake of your steadfast love.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你回轉搭救我， 因你慈愛的緣故拯救我。

en: For in death there is no remembrance of you; in Sheol who will give you praise?
zh: 因為在死亡之地無人記念你， 在陰間有誰稱謝你呢？

en: I am weary with my moaning; every night I flood my bed with tears; I drench my couch with my weeping.
zh: 我因悲歎而疲憊， 我夜夜流淚，把床漂起， 把床榻浸透。

en: My eye wastes away because of grief; it grows weak because of all my foes.
zh: 我因愁煩眼目昏花， 因眾多的仇敵視力衰退。

en: Depart from me, all you workers of evil, for the LORD has heard the sound of my weeping.
zh: 你們所有作惡的人，離開我去吧， 因為耶和華聽了我哀哭的聲音。

en: The LORD has heard my plea; the LORD accepts my prayer.
zh: 耶和華聽了我的懇求， 耶和華必接納我的禱告。

en: All my enemies shall be ashamed and greatly troubled; they shall turn back and be put to shame in a moment.
zh: 我所有的仇敵都必蒙羞，大大驚惶； 眨眼之間，他們必蒙羞後退。
